conflict: The drawing room appears — the room where Hermione was tortured and Draco watched — at the moment she is closest to feeling safe in the Manor
consequence: The war's worst moment between them is on the table. The drawing room cannot be pretended away. Civil distance is no longer available
must_land_beats: Hermione's guard lowering — small moment of unguarded interiority before the room appears
The drawing room: specific, sensory, the trauma preserved in merciless detail — chandelier, marble, cold
The reckoning: not clean. She tells him what she remembers. He tells her what he remembers. Neither handles it well. Unfair things said. Inadequate things said. They leave separately

payoffs_to_land.description: The room Draco has been avoiding manifests for Hermione at maximum vulnerability. The emotional geography of the Manor made concrete

pressure_source: The drawing room appears — the room where Hermione was tortured and Draco watched — at the moment she is closest to feeling safe in the Manor
state_shift: The war's worst moment between them is on the table. The drawing room cannot be pretended away. Civil distance is no longer available
